name_cn:
Genuine Grade
BVLGARI SERPENTI FOREVER
Model: 38102 Black
Dimensions: 22*13*5.5cm
Counter Hot Selling Series Serpenti Forever Exquisite Crossbody Bag, Original Quality, Imported Calfskin, Custom Original Hardware. 🔅 Adorned with Serpenti enamel light gold-plated snake head clasp. Can also be used as an evening bag. Exquisite like jewelry 💎. Includes raincoat, mirror, gift box packaging
